compiled_state.title: [UPDATE] test_ticket_reducer.py: add orphan-marker self-heal tests for reduce_all_tickets()
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Add tests to tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py for orphan-marker self-heal behavior in reduce_all_tickets(). Tests: (1) test_orphan_marker_removed_and_slow_path_taken — create ticket dir with .archived marker but NO *-ARCHIVED.json event file, verify reduce_all_tickets() removes the marker and returns correct active state; (2) test_valid_marker_not_removed — ticket with both .archived marker and *-ARCHIVED.json event file is not touched; (3) test_orphan_marker_cache_miss_on_self_heal — after orphan removal, a second reduce_all_tickets() call also returns correct state (marker absence propagated to cache). testing_mode: UPDATE.
